englishDefinitions: Young chickens or other young birds.
Informal and sometimes disrespectful slang for girls or women.
persianTranslation: دخترها یا زن‌ها به زبان عامیانه
examples: The chicks followed their mother around the yard.
The farmer kept the chicks warm under a lamp.
He used the word chicks to talk about women, but it sounded rude.
